text.message: I think you'll be doing just fine blue
I’m just surprised green left that for you
yeah it makes sense for you
If I road the other way it does me no good
Got lucky I hit wood on first roll
I’ve been robbed all three times early
So frustrating when you can’t play the game
why embargo me i robbed you one time
I just didn’t want to get spammed with your trades
I’ll take it off next turn
i wanted to be nice to blue
he has an open settle and a dev
way too much whining for 2 points lol
I tried to offer you a deal
instead of the guy who plowed you or the guy who was about to city
I said putting the road to the middle from my second settlement was pointless
you complained about being robbed and returned my generosity with plowing me a second time
you got a 1 in 6 wood so congrats. you cant seriously have thought id have traded it
Look at your settlements and then decide who to be mad at
I know your mad and salty but I’m
Being serious. Your first settlement should have been were Orange went
Just trying to help you learn
the rob on me was truly nuts when he was trying to plow you
i was obviously offering him a truce
since he was complaining about not being able to play the game
We all know I’m being robbed anyway
how about at least blocking red
well look how you repay people who dont rob you
Green your salty cause you have a losing strategy from the get go
oj never the steal? with 2:1 with 69?
Pretty sure you robbed me back to back for double ore earlier res
Spread the love and I’ll consider it
turns out green was smart in not taking 9 6 4. it never rolls
red, I don't think I've ever been over 7 cards
hard to feel sorry for you
to help red settle pop po
you seem to be the teacher
blue has no sheep, good value
so blue plowing me two times wasn't enough?
the first time I'm over 7 cards
blue at 9 with road and settle
its futile but i can try
ill need significant help unless 10 starts popping off
red, why tf would you do that
I still need to building city’s and stuff
Your oath to victory is easier tbh
oj is bitter already don’t worry he‘ll king make
are you really that dumb red??
